error.channelNotEnabled: This channel is not enabled. Please go to the control panel to enable it.
error.unknownCommand:
Unknown command: `/{command}`

Please use `@avibe /start` to access all bot features.
error.settingsFailed: Failed to open settings. Please try again.
error.cwdChangeFailed: Failed to open directory change dialog. Please try again.
error.resumeFailed: Failed to open resume dialog. Please try again.
error.cwdNotDirectory: Path exists but is not a directory: `{path}`
error.routingModalFailed: Failed to open agent settings. Please try again.
error.languageUpdateFailed: Language update failed. Please try again.
error.updateUnavailable: Update action is not available right now.
error.agentNotConfigured: Agent `{agent}` uses the {backend} backend, but that backend is not available. {hint}

agentNotConfiguredHint.opencode: Enable the OpenCode backend, install the OpenCode CLI, or set OPENCODE_CLI_PATH.
agentNotConfiguredHint.claude: Enable the Claude Code backend and make sure the Claude Code CLI path is configured.
agentNotConfiguredHint.codex: Enable the Codex backend, install the Codex CLI, or set CODEX_CLI_PATH.
agentNotConfiguredHint.generic: Choose an enabled Agent in Agent settings, or enable the backend this Agent uses.

error.streamTurnInProgress: ⚠️ A reply is already streaming for this session — wait for it to finish, then try again.
error.sessionReset: Session error detected. Session has been reset. Please try your message again.
error.sessionConnectionLost: Connection to Claude was lost. Please try your message again.
error.claudeSessionNotFound:
Claude Code could not find the historical session `{sessionId}` in the current working directory:
`{path}`

Claude Code sessions are scoped to a working directory. This usually means the conversation was resumed after switching workdirs, or the local Claude Code session data changed. Switch back to the original working directory to continue that session, or start a new Claude Code session from the current directory.
error.resultAttachmentUploadFailed: Failed to upload attachment. Want me to split the result into multiple messages?
error.resultDeliveryFailed: ⚠️ Message delivery failed. The content may be too long or incompatible. Ask me to resend it.
error.fileAttachmentUploadFailedWithLink:
⚠️ I could not deliver {filename} as a WeChat file. You can download it from Avibe after signing in if prompted:
{url}
error.fileAttachmentUploadFailedNoLink: ⚠️ I could not deliver {filename} as a WeChat file. Please ask me to resend it or use another channel.
error.opencodeQuestionToolDisabled: OpenCode asked an interactive question, but Avibe disables the OpenCode question tool. Please send a new follow-up message with your answer or direction.
error.opencodeQuestionToolDisabledRestored: Restored OpenCode session asked an interactive question, but Avibe disables the OpenCode question tool. Please send a new follow-up message with your answer or direction.
error.opencodeEmptyResponse: OpenCode finished without a model reply. Provider: {provider}; model: {model}; reasoning: {variant}. OpenCode did not expose a provider error for this run.
error.opencodeProviderRuntimeError: OpenCode provider request failed. Provider: {provider}; model: {model}; reasoning: {variant}. Detail: {detail}

success.sessionResumedContinueThread: 💬 *Reply in this thread* to continue with this session.
success.sessionResumedContinueFeishuThread: 💬 *Reply to this message* to continue with this session.
success.sessionResumedContinueDiscordThread: 💬 *Reply in the subchannel to this message* to continue with this session.
success.sessionResumedContinueDirect: 💬 *Send your next message directly* to continue with this session.
success.sessionResumedThreadFreshTip: _(Sending a new message in the main channel will start a fresh session.)_
success.routingUpdateNeedsNewSession: Use /new to create a new session for this setting change to take effect. The new session will replace the current session.

settings.personalizationDesc: Configure how {agent} messages appear in your Slack workspace.
settings.visibilityDesc: Select which message types to hide from {agent} output:

update.actionUnavailable: Update action unavailable for this message.
update.alreadyInProgress: Upgrade already in progress. Please wait.
update.alreadyInProgressWarning: ⚠️ An upgrade is already in progress. Please wait.
update.checkFailed: Update check failed. Please try again later.
update.infoUnavailable: Update information unavailable. Please try again later.
update.upgradeFailedSlack:
❌ *Upgrade Failed*

Please check the logs for details.
update.updatingSlack:
⏳ *Updating Avibe...*

Please wait, the service will restart shortly.
update.restartRequiredSlack:
✅ *Upgrade complete*

Please restart Avibe to apply the update.
update.availableSlack:
🚀 *Avibe Update Available*

A new version is available: `{current}` → {latestLink}

discord.settingsSubtitle: Adjust message visibility, mention behavior, and language.
discord.routingSubtitle: Select backend and model settings for this channel.

info.messageTypesFooter: Hidden messages won't be sent to your IM platform.
info.howItWorksRealtimeDesc: Prefix your message with `AgentName:` to route to a specific agent, e.g. `Plan: design a caching layer`
info.howItWorksPersistentDesc: Send a new message while the agent is running — it will stop and start your new task. Or type `stop` to cancel.
info.howItWorksCommandsDesc: Each thread is an isolated session. Open multiple threads to run parallel tasks.
info.howItWorksResumeDesc: Switch from desktop to mobile without losing momentum. Reopen recent Claude Code, OpenCode, or Codex sessions from this working directory and continue instantly.
info.howItWorksWorkDirDesc: Attach images or files to your message — the agent can read them directly.
info.howItWorksTasksDesc: Ask the agent to schedule recurring or one-off prompts, or queue a single async follow-up after a long-running job.
info.howItWorksSettingsDesc: Mention @bot to switch agents, models, reasoning effort, or hide verbose message types.
info.howItWorksFooter: Just type to chat with {agent}. No special commands needed!
info.resultDeliveredAsAttachment: ⚠️ The message could not be sent inline, so I sent it as `result.md` above.

settings.title: Settings
settings.requireMentionHint: When enabled, the bot only responds when @mentioned in channels (DMs always work).
settings.messageVisibilityDesc: Choose which message types to *show* from agent output. Unselected types won't appear in your Slack workspace.
settings.tip: You can show/hide message types at any time. Changes apply immediately to new messages.
settings.requireMentionLarkNote: Note: To receive non-mention messages in groups, the Feishu app needs the `im:message.group_msg` permission.
settings.languageHint: Changes the language for bot messages in Slack and the Web UI.

cwd.title: Change Working Directory
cwd.hint: Use absolute path (e.g., /home/user/project) or ~ for home directory
cwd.tip: The directory will be created if it doesn't exist.

resume.title: Resume Session
resume.description: Select a recent agent session from the current working directory, or paste a session ID to resume work in this thread.
resume.chooseOneOf: Choose one of the two options below:
resume.discordPickOrPaste: Select a recent session below, or use the OR button to paste a Session ID manually.
resume.manualCaptured: Session ID captured. Click Resume to continue.
resume.showingFirst100: Showing the first 100 recent sessions for this working directory. Paste a session ID below for others.
resume.noSessionsFound: No recent agent sessions found for this working directory. Use the OR button below to paste a session ID and resume manually.

routing.title: Agent Settings
routing.tip: Select (Default) to use the backend's configured defaults.

start.commandResume: /resume - Restore a recent session for this working directory
start.quickActionsDesc: Use the buttons below to manage your {agent} sessions, or simply type any message to start chatting with {agent}!

new.started: Started a fresh session. Your next message will begin a new conversation.

clear.noSessions:
No active sessions to clear.
Session state has been reset.

cwd.hint: This is where Agent will execute commands
cwd.changeInstructions:
To change working directory, use:
`/setcwd <path>`

Example:
`/setcwd ~/projects/myapp`
cwd.clickButton: Click the 'Change Work Dir' button in the /start menu to change working directory.

resume.slackOnly: Resume is currently available only on Slack. Continue in the same thread to auto-resume.
resume.scopeOnly: ⏮️ /resume can only be used at the channel level, not inside an existing thread. Start it from the main channel — it opens a fresh session you can continue.
resume.clickButton: Please click the Resume Session button in the menu message below to open the picker.
resume.noStoredSessions: No recent agent sessions found for this working directory.
resume.noStoredSessionsForBackend: No recent {backend} sessions found for this working directory.
resume.listTitle: Recent agent sessions for the current working directory
resume.usagePick: /resume 1 - Restore item 1 from the current list
resume.snapshotExpired: The last shown session list expired. Please run /resume again first.
resume.invalidSelection: Choose a valid number from the current list.
resume.unknownBackend: Unknown backend. Use oc, cc, cx, or a full backend name.
resume.noMorePages: There are no more sessions to show.

setup.unsupportedBackend: Backend `{backend}` does not support setup yet.
setup.noActiveFlow: There is no active setup flow for this channel.
setup.notFlowOwner: Only the user who started this setup flow can submit the follow-up code.
setup.codeNotSupported: This backend does not accept follow-up setup codes.
setup.notAwaitingCode: This setup flow is not waiting for a code right now.
setup.codeSubmitted: {backend} setup code submitted. Waiting for login confirmation...
setup.claudeCallbackSubmitted: Claude OAuth callback submitted. Waiting for login confirmation...
setup.claudeCallbackUsage: For Claude, send the full `authorizationCode#state` value from the browser callback page directly in this chat.
setup.claudeMethodPrompt: Choose the Claude sign-in source before starting OAuth.
setup.claudeMethodFallback: Choose a Claude sign-in source with `/setup claude claudeai` or `/setup claude console`.
setup.resetPrompt: {backend} looks logged out. Use the button below to restart OAuth setup.
setup.resetPromptPlain: {backend} looks logged out. Run `/setup {backend}` to restart OAuth setup.
setup.manualFallback: If inline buttons are unavailable, run `/setup {backend}`.
setup.codexInstructions:
Codex setup started.

1. Open this URL in your browser:
{url}

2. Enter this one-time code:
`{code}`

The bot will keep waiting here and confirm when login finishes.
setup.claudeInstructions:
Claude setup started.

Open this URL in your browser and finish the login flow:
{url}

When the browser callback page shows the final `authorizationCode#state` value, send it back directly in this chat.
setup.claudeCodePrompt: Claude is waiting for a follow-up value. Send it directly in this chat.
setup.opencodeDeviceInstructions:
OpenCode setup started.

1. Open this URL in your browser:
{url}

2. Enter this one-time code:
`{code}`

The bot will keep waiting here and confirm when authorization finishes.
setup.opencodeInstructions:
OpenCode setup started for `{provider}`.

Open this page to create or retrieve a credential:
{url}

When you get the key, reply with it directly in this chat.
setup.opencodeCodePrompt: OpenCode is waiting for the `{provider}` API key. Reply with the key directly in this chat.
setup.opencodeCodeRetryPrompt: OpenCode is still waiting for the `{provider}` API key. The previous value may not have been accepted. Reply with the key directly in this chat.
setup.timedOut: {backend} setup timed out. Start setup again to retry.

stop.noActiveSession: No active session to stop for this channel.

routing.slackOnly: 🤖 Agent switching is currently only available in Slack. Use Slack Agent Settings to configure routing.
routing.introDesc: Configure which backend to use for this channel.

bind.success: ✅ Bind successful! Welcome, {name}. You can now use Avibe via DM.
bind.successAdmin: ✅ Bind successful! Welcome, {name}. You are the first user and have been granted admin privileges.
bind.menuHintButtons: To open the action menu, mention the bot with no extra text, for example `@bot`.
bind.menuHintStart: Send `/start` to open more action menus.
bind.alreadyBound: You are already bound. No action needed.
bind.invalidCode: ❌ Invalid or expired bind code. Please check and try again.
bind.usage:
Usage: `bind <code>`

`/bind <code>` also works. Please enter the bind code provided by an admin.
bind.dmOnly: The bind command can only be used in a direct message. Please DM the bot with `bind <code>`.
bind.dmNotBound:
🔒 You haven't bound your account yet.
Use `bind <code>` to get started. (`/bind <code>` is also supported.)

permission.adminOnly: 🔒 Only admins can change bot settings. Contact an admin if you need access.

telegram.autoTopicGeneralNotice: Started a new topic for this request: {topic}. Continue there.
telegram.cwdPromptBody: Send the new path as your next message. Use `/cancel` or the button below to abort.
telegram.resumeBody: Pick one of the saved sessions below.
telegram.resumeNoStoredSessions: No stored sessions are available for this chat yet.

oauth_error.cookie_hint: Still stuck after trying again? Make sure your browser allows cookies for this site.
oauth_error.default_body: Your sign-in didn't finish. Please try again.
oauth_error.invalid_oauth_state_body: The secure login link expired or couldn't be matched to this browser. This usually happens when a sign-in link sits unused for a few minutes, or is opened in a different tab or window. Start over and you'll be right back in.
oauth_error.oauth_exchange_failed_title: We couldn't finish signing you in
oauth_error.oauth_exchange_failed_body: Avibe Cloud didn't complete the sign-in just now. This is usually temporary — please try again.
oauth_error.invalid_oauth_nonce_body: This sign-in attempt couldn't be verified, so we stopped to keep your account secure. Start over to continue.
